parsed.reason: The calendar event is well-structured and appropriate for a family context. The title clearly identifies who (Mira) and what (pediatric appointment), the doctor's name is included, location is specific and realistic, and the time block is reasonable for an appointment. The notes are helpful. Minor deduction only because the notes are a slight repetition of the title rather than adding unique information (e.g., any special instructions or reason for visit), but this is not a significant flaw for a calendar entry.
